description: Letter from Zikri to R. Natan b. Shemuel 'The Nezer', containing only the address. Dating: ca. 1128-1164 CE, based on the years when the recipient was active– but this range may be narrowed further according to the active dates of the letter sender. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
